s2.ptxt: Using SST, turn the belt tensioner counterclockwise and remove the bar.
If it is difficult to install the V-ribbed belt, perform the following procedure:

s3.ptxt: Put the V-ribbed belt on every pulley except the tensioner pulley as shown in the illustration.
While releasing the belt tension by turning the belt tensioner counterclockwise, put the V-ribbed belt on the tensioner pulley.

item.ptxt: Put the backside of the V-ribbed belt on the tensioner pulley and idler pulley.
Check that the V-ribbed belt is properly set to each pulley.

s3.ptxt: After installing the V-ribbed belt, check that it fits properly in the ribbed grooves. Confirm that the belt has not slipped out of the grooves on the bottom of the crank pulley by hand.

s2.ptxt: Fit the 3 retainers and install the V-bank cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT FENDER APRON SEAL RH
